decisions.description: if there is no change to the sub baseline because the GR has just rearranged the values on the Forecasts and not changed the totals
decisions.name: Check_Current_Sub_baseline_item_exists
decisions.label: Check Current Sub baseline item exists

Flow.description: Sub flow handling the changes to Forecast data for LG awards
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Forecasts

fields.name: DelieveryPlanGuidance
fields.fieldText:
The top row of the below table is data from the baseline: {!varBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Baselines do not have Homes Validated or Homes Assessed data ergo zero is being displayed for these columns


The Monthly Forecast rows of the remaining columns all require to sum to the baseline row value.


The bottom row of the table displays the difference between the sum and the baseline for ease.

fields.name: DisplayAABreached
fields.fieldText: Error - Award A&A too high
